story-0029-0001.summary: Replaced informal checkbox sub-tasks in _TEMPLATE-STORY.md Section 8 with formal task blocks (TASK-XXXX-YYYY-NNN IDs, testability patterns, sizing constraints). Added SD-12 and SD-13 rules to story-decomposition.md. Regenerated golden files. All tests pass.

story-0029-0002.summary: Created TaskStatus enum (9 states), TaskEntry record, extended StoryEntry with tasks/parentBranch fields, extended ExecutionState with version field, updated CheckpointValidation and ResumeHandler with task-level support. All 5612 tests pass. Full backward compatibility.

story-0029-0003.summary: Created x-format skill for multi-language code formatting (Java/TypeScript/Python/Go/Rust/Kotlin). Registered in SkillGroupRegistry dev group. Regenerated golden files for all 17 profiles. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0004.summary: Created x-lint skill for multi-language code linting (6 languages). Registered in SkillGroupRegistry dev group. Regenerated golden files for all 17+2 profiles. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0005.summary: Created x-commit skill with SKILL.md, README.md, and GitHub Copilot variant. Implements Conventional Commits with Task ID scope (TASK-XXXX-YYYY-NNN), TDD tags, and pre-commit chain orchestration (x-format -> x-lint -> compile -> commit). Registered in SkillGroupRegistry dev group. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0006.summary: Created x-worktree skill with all 4 operations (create, list, remove, cleanup), naming convention (RULE-018), protected branch enforcement, cleanup criteria, dry-run support. Regenerated golden files. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0007.summary: Created x-plan-task skill with SKILL.md and README.md for individual task planning. Per-task TDD cycle mapping in TPP order, file impact analysis by architecture layer, security checklist by task type, idempotency via staleness check, integration with x-dev-lifecycle PRE_PLANNED mode. Registered in SkillGroupRegistry story group. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0008.summary: Created x-tdd skill with Red-Green-Refactor cycle management, TPP ordering, Double-Loop TDD integration, atomic commits via x-commit with TDD tags, --from-cycle resume, --dry-run mode, coverage checks, and auto-revert on failed refactoring. Generated 72 golden files. All tests pass.

story-0029-0009.summary: Created x-pr-create skill with 5-phase workflow (validate branch, pre-check tests, format title, generate structured body, auto-labels, create PR via gh CLI). Supports --draft, --auto-approve-pr, --description flags. Registered in SkillGroupRegistry. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0010.summary: Created x-docs documentation automation skill with SKILL.md and README.md templates. Registered in SkillGroupRegistry dev group. Regenerated all 17+2 golden files. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0011.summary: Extracted 6 individual review skills from monolithic x-review: 2 core (x-review-qa, x-review-perf) always included, 4 conditional (x-review-db, x-review-obs, x-review-devops, x-review-data-modeling) feature-gated. Added selectReviewSkills() to SkillsSelection. 15 new tests. All 5536 tests pass.

story-0029-0012.summary: Refactored x-review orchestrator SKILL.md to delegate review execution to individual skills via Skill tool. Removed 9 inline checklists. Added Specialist Reference Table with 9 entries. Updated GitHub Copilot variant, 70 golden files across 17 profiles. All 5544 tests pass.

story-0029-0013.summary: Enhanced x-story-create with formal testable tasks (Section 8 with TASK-XXXX-YYYY-NNN IDs, 6 testability patterns, 4 anti-pattern detections, sizing constraints min 3/max 8 tasks) and mandatory Section 3.5 (Value Delivery). Updated source templates and all 70 golden files.

story-0029-0014.summary: Added Section 8 (Task-Level Dependencies) to x-story-map SKILL.md with cross-story task dependency extraction, RULE-012 validation, topological sort merge order, and Mermaid task dependency graph. Updated template and all 68 golden files. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0015.summary: Major rewrite of x-dev-lifecycle for task-centric workflow. Phase 2 rewritten as Task Execution Loop (per-task: branch -> x-tdd -> x-pr-create -> approval gate). Phase 3 absorbs old Phases 3-8 as Story-Level Verification. Added --auto-approve-pr with parent branch model, resume per task, delegation to atomic skills. Updated templates and 68 golden files. 35 new tests. All 5556 tests pass.

story-0029-0016.summary: Enhanced x-dev-epic-implement with --auto-approve-pr propagation, --batch-approval for consolidated prompts, --task-tracking for task-level state in execution-state.json, cross-story task dependency enforcement, enhanced resume with task-level PR reclassification, backward compatibility via schema version. Updated templates and 68 golden files. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0017.summary: Updated x-git-push with task-centric branch naming (feat/task-XXXX-YYYY-NNN-short-desc), task commit scope, task PR title/body templates, parent branch naming for auto-approve mode, and x-commit/x-pr-create delegation. Updated all 73 golden files. All 5521 tests pass.

story-0029-0018.summary: Registered x-worktree, x-tdd, x-review-qa, x-review-perf in SkillGroupRegistry. Created GitHub Copilot templates for 4 new skills. Synced x-story-create section numbering. Regenerated golden files for all 17 profiles and expected-artifacts.json. Full build passes: 5670 unit + 837 integration tests, 0 failures.
